reviews.comment:
Exelente lugar. Baños impecables. Muy buena atención. Variedad en la confitería y exelente atención también. Limpio y ordenado. Gracias.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent location. Spotless bathrooms. Very good service. Variety in the confectionery and excellent service as well. Clean and tidy. Thank you.

reviews.comment:
Me encanta parar acá cada vez que vamos para la costa. Los baños siempre impecables y el servicio de comidas siempre es veloz. Parada recomendada si van con mascotas para que puedan recorrer en el pasto un largo rato

(Translated by Google)
I love stopping here every time we go to the coast. The bathrooms are always spotless and the food service is always fast. A recommended stop if you're traveling with pets so they can run around in the grass for a long time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOck02cDJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Para hacer un alto en el camino. Un poco de pasto, unas mesitas y baños 5 puntos. Hay un museo que justo quise visitar y estaba cerrado...una lastima

(Translated by Google)
A nice stop along the way. A bit of grass, some tables, and bathrooms. 5 points. There's a museum I was just about to visit, but it was closed... too bad.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOek55U1pREAE
